regime_shifts.signature: feat% surges, fix% drops, eval_density explodes

assumptions.evidence: src/zenoh_transport: 20 commits all E1-E2, zero since. No edge deployment in PROGRESS.md.

assumptions.claim: compete with mem0 and Zep on speed/privacy
assumptions.evidence: PROGRESS.md: 'cognitive amplifier, not benchmark optimizer'. Mission shifted from external competition to internal precision.
MCP server is primary interface. python/ has no E5 commits. CLAUDE.md and hooks are the living interface.
REST still exists but MCP tools are the actual usage path for veld's stated purpose.
src/auth.rs, data locality preserved throughout. No cloud dependencies added.
Layer 3.5 brute-force references tiers explicitly. Architecture unchanged.
PROGRESS.md contains zero deployment stories. Dockerfile not developed since E1.

assumptions.claim: benchmarks vs competitors as success metric
assumptions.evidence: LOCOMO/LongMemEval are internal diagnostic instruments. Not external competition.
src/zenoh_transport/ compiles, 20 commits in E1-E2, zero development since.

findings: OBSOLETE founding frame: 4 of 10 founding assumptions fully abandoned (edge/IoT, Python-primary, Docker-enterprise, Zenoh)
TRANSFORMED mission: external competitive product → cognitive amplifier substrate. Different users, different moat.
3-tier architecture and offline guarantee are the genuine inherited assets worth preserving.

inflection_points.description: Style debt cleanup (style% 7%→20%). Internal decision to pay formatting debt.
inflection_points.evidence: 42 style commits in E2 vs 23 in E1

inflection_points.description: OOM, vector leaks, GDPR, race conditions surfaced in unplanned audits. Fix% 23%→44%. No decision point found.
inflection_points.evidence: fix: 12 verified audit bugs (59e2faa), fix: deep audit 14 bugs (adc4764) — all reactive

inflection_points.description: Evaluation framework (bifocal-eval, overlook) adopted. Shift from reactive fixing to systematic measurement.
inflection_points.evidence: bifocal.code-workspace created; evaluations/ directory; first bifocal artifacts 2026-03-27

inflection_points.description: Explicit MRR targets, 20-signal pipeline, dual-embedder. PROGRESS.md mission stated.

findings: 3 of 4 inflections were intentional — deliberate evolution is the dominant pattern
The one unintentional inflection (E2→E3 crisis) was caused by the founding velocity: production-grade promises met real production bugs
Evaluation framework adoption (E3→E4) is the most consequential intentional pivot — it changed how the project reasons about itself

gaps.evidence: PROGRESS.md P1-#3: 24h effort, ScoringSignals struct exists, recall.rs static weights never connected to /api/reinforce training
PROGRESS.md P2-#8: BM25 concept expansion exists, embedding-level expansion = 0 commits
evaluations/intugest_2026-03-30_candlekeep_never_forget.json: 'MRR misleads for agents'. No agent-eval infrastructure.
PROGRESS.md P1-#6: LOCOMO-20 saturating, 4h effort, not started

excess.evidence: src/zenoh_transport/ 20 commits E1-E2, zero since. No callers in current architecture.
src/ab_testing.rs 16 commits, P3 deferred, superseded by Bifocal evaluation framework.
Extensive DELETE endpoints built in E1, no active development since.

findings: Feedback loop is the highest-leverage void: adaptive learning is architecturally ready but not wired
Benchmark saturation void is existential: without new data, future MRR work cannot be validated
Agent-usability is the void most aligned with the project's stated mission (cognitive amplifier) — and least addressed
memory/ is severely over-concentrated at 37.7% of all commits with diminishing ROI (last 3 signals = +0.003 MRR)
embeddings/ has HIGHER per-commit ROI than memory/ despite 7x fewer commits — the embedding quality thesis is supported
graph_memory.rs: 85 commits, 8% scoring weight, moderate ROI — well-proportioned
zenoh_transport and ab_testing: 36 commits, zero ROI — vestigial investment

oscillations.root_cause: bincode 1.x→2.x migration never completed — format divergence keeps creating corrupt-length-field vulnerabilities
oscillations.resolution: Complete bincode 2.x migration, deprecate 1.x codepath entirely

oscillations.root_cause: MiniLM vs Nomic primary unresolved. P2-#7 gated on P1-#5 backfill.
oscillations.resolution: Commit to Nomic once backfill complete. Deprecate MiniLM as primary.

stable: knowledge graph (graph_memory.rs) — consistent investment, no reversals
3-tier memory architecture — foundation unchanged all 5 epochs
findings: Bincode vortex will trigger again — root cause (format migration) has never been the commit target, only symptoms
Embedding vortex is architectural: deferred bifurcation point will force resolution in P1-P2 sprint
Vortex intensity is moderate (x=0.35) — the project is not dominated by oscillation, but two persistent loops exist

projections.evidence: 5 orthogonal signals adversarially collapsed, PROGRESS.md: 'algorithm is no longer the bottleneck'

projections.target: 24h to connect ScoringSignals to adaptive learning

findings: 65% of current momentum converging on MRR approaching its asymptote — diversity is low
The highest-leverage growth surface (feedback loop) has zero current trajectory momentum
Benchmark saturation is an existential risk: the measuring instrument is the constraint, not the algorithm

genesis_x_inflection.finding: The E2→E3 crisis was caused by the founding velocity. E1's 'production-ready from day 1' positioning created the structural debt that E3 was forced to repay. The founding assumption directly caused the only unintentional inflection.

void_x_horizon.finding: CRITICAL: The project is diverging FROM its capability voids rather than self-correcting. Feedback loop, query reformulation, and agent-usability remain unbuilt while 65% of momentum concentrates on MRR approaching asymptote.

cluster_x_vortex.finding: src/memory/ is both the most-invested module (37.7% of commits) AND the vortex source (bincode OOM fixed 3x across 3 epochs, root cause untouched). Maximum investment concentrated in the module that keeps generating the same unfixed problem.

growth_surfaces: Feedback loop unification (P1-#3): 24h effort, enables adaptive learning. Highest ROI unbuilt feature.
Benchmark expansion (P1-#6): 4h effort, prevents measurement ceiling from masking real algorithmic gains.
Query reformulation at embedding level (P2-#8): stated remaining lever, zero E5 investment despite PROGRESS.md priority.
extinction_risks: Benchmark saturation: LOCOMO-20 will appear to plateau at 0.93 MRR. Need adversarial/messy queries before next sprint.
Founding-frame drift: README still positions as edge/enterprise vs mem0. Active development is cognitive amplifier for LLM agents. These need alignment or the project has two incompatible identities.
unresolved_vortexes: Bincode OOM (commit #8 will happen): complete bincode 2.x migration, deprecate 1.x codepath.
Embedding primary (MiniLM vs Nomic): resolve in P1-P2 sprint after backfill.
